# PF & Co Construction
> AI-powered structural engineering, construction, and site intelligence services nationwide across England and Wales.

## About
PF & Co Construction is an engineering-led construction firm specialising in structural design, precision construction, and data-driven site intelligence. We combine AI-optimised design tools with hands-on engineering expertise to deliver safer, faster, and more cost-effective outcomes. PI insured, with 24-hour turnaround on quotes. Our multi-agent AI system interrogates 58 authoritative data sources across 11 constraint categories to produce planning-ready reports in 48 hours.

## Services

### Structural Engineering
Residential and commercial structural design, beam calculations (RSJ/steel), basement impact assessments, and load-bearing wall removals. Nationwide coverage.
URL: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/structural-engineering

### Construction
Engineering-led construction services including structural alterations, extensions, loft conversions, and basement builds.
URL: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/construction

### Site Intelligence
Data-driven pre-construction screening reports interrogating 58 authoritative data sources across 11 constraint categories. Reports include:
- Site Feasibility Report — 22+ constraint screening, Planning Friction Score (EA £1,500 / Stripe £297)
- Geotechnical Desk Study — BGS geology, contamination, foundation risk (EA £900 / Stripe £197)
- Flood Risk Assessment — 7 flood sources, Decision Risk Scores (EA £375 / Stripe £147)
- Planning Statement — Policy evidence and planning justification (EA £900 / Stripe £197)
- Heritage Impact Assessment — Listed buildings, conservation areas (EA £725 / Stripe £197)
- Design & Access Statement — DMPO 2015 compliant DAS (EA £600 / Stripe £147)
- Transport Statement — Trip generation, highways, accessibility (EA £600 / Stripe £147)
- Sustainability / Energy Statement — Part L, SAP, MEES (EA £550 / Stripe £147)
- CIL Liability Assessment — Levy exposure, exemptions, relief (EA £500 / Stripe £147)
- Construction Management Plan — Pre-commencement CMP condition (EA £425 / Stripe £147)
- Party Wall Pre-Assessment — Party Wall Act 1996 assessment (EA £425 / Stripe £147)
- Pre-Construction Design Review — 95-check coordination review (EA £425 / Stripe £147)
- Parking Provision Statement — Evidence-based parking demand (EA £375 / Stripe £97)
- Biodiversity Net Gain Screening — BNG applicability, 10% metric (EA £300 / Stripe £97)
- Concept Feasibility Study — GDV, cost appraisal, viability (EA £1,200 / Stripe £247)
- Pre-Application Advice Pack — LPA pre-submission engagement (EA £1,100 / Stripe £247)
- Tree Survey (BS 5837) — Categorisation, RPAs, impact assessment (EA £575 / Stripe £147)
- BC Readiness Check — Building Control submission readiness (EA £150 / Stripe £47)
EA = Early Access price shown on website. Stripe = actual checkout price. All prices exclude VAT.
URL: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/site-intelligence
Order: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/order-report
Sample reports: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/samples/{slug}-sample.pdf

### Report Packages (Bundles)
Pre-construction diligence bundles at additional savings:
- The Complete Intelligence (16 reports, all phases): £6,995 EA — Save 55%
- The Full Planning Suite (8 planning application reports): £3,495 EA — Save 37%
- The Developer Due Diligence (5 reports, site acquisition): £3,095 EA — Save 39%
- The Self-Build Starter (4 reports, plot assessment): £3,050 EA — Save 32%
- The Appeal-Ready Pack (5 reports, submission + appeal): £2,735 EA — Save 35%
- The Architect Support Pack (5 reports, design evidence): £2,625 EA — Save 39%
- The Triple Threat (3 core reports, most popular entry): £2,375 EA — Save 36%
- The Construction Readiness Pack (2 post-permission reports): £1,195 EA — Save 32%
URL: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/report-packages
Plans & Pricing Roadmap: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/how-it-works

### AI Innovation
Multi-agent AI system with 112 specialised agents across 7 categories (Data Acquisition, Analysis & Scoring, Market Intelligence, Structural Engineering, Construction & Project, Platform & Operations, Computer Vision). Interrogates 58 authoritative data sources across 11 constraint categories including BGS, Environment Agency, Historic England, Natural England, Land Registry, National Grid, NaPTAN, CQC, GIAS, DNO capacity heatmaps, and UK House Price Index.
URL: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/ai-innovation

### Subscriptions
Engineering as a Service — structural calculations and priority design support for a fixed monthly fee.
- Starter: £595/mo
- Professional: £1,495/mo
- Enterprise: £2,995/mo
URL: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/subscriptions
